/* Section */
.himex-content {
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.himex-badge-label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #111;
    background: #f3f4f6;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    line-height: 1;
}

.himex-badge-icon {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: #111; /* controls SVG stroke */
}

.himex-content h3 {
    font-size:36px;
  font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-content p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom:30px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.himex-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
}

.himex-list li {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-list li:before {
    content: "";
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #2ecc71;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 12px;
}

/* Form Card */

.himex-form-card{
    background:#f4f4f4;
    padding:50px;
    border-radius:16px;
    box-shadow:0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
}

.himex-form-card h3{
    text-align:center;
    font-size:36px;
  font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    color:#0d2d5c;
}

.himex-form-card .subtitle{
    text-align:center;
    color:#7b8794;
    margin-bottom:35px;
}

.himex-form-card label{
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#5b6470;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=email]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:1px solid #d7dde5;
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:0 20px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.checkbox-row{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:10px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
}

.checkbox-row input{
    margin-top: 8px;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=submit]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:none;
    border-radius:8px;
    background:#01cb68;
    color:#fff;
    font-weight:700; 
  text-transform:uppercase;
    font-size:18px;
    cursor:pointer;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=submit]:hover{
    opacity:.9;
}

.download-note{
    margin-top:25px;
    color:#97a0aa;
}

/* Mobile */

@media(max-width:768px){

    .himex-content h3 {
        font-size: 28px;
    }

    .himex-content p {
        font-size: 15px;
    }

    .himex-list li {
        font-size: 15px;
    }

    .himex-form-card {
        padding: 30px;
        margin-top: 30px;
    }
}

/* Section */
.himex-content {
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.himex-badge-label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #111;
    background: #f3f4f6;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    line-height: 1;
}

.himex-badge-icon {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: #111; /* controls SVG stroke */
}

.himex-content h3 {
    font-size:36px;
        font-weight:700;
        text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-content p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom:30px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.himex-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
}

.himex-list li {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-list li:before {
    content: "";
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #2ecc71;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 12px;
}

/* Form Card */

.himex-form-card{
    background:#f4f4f4;
    padding:50px;
    border-radius:16px;
    box-shadow:0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
}

.himex-form-card h3{
    text-align:center;
    font-size:36px;
        font-weight:700;
        text-transform:uppercase;
        line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    color:#0d2d5c;
}

.himex-form-card .subtitle{
    text-align:center;
    color:#7b8794;
    margin-bottom:35px;
}

.himex-form-card label{
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#5b6470;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=email]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:1px solid #d7dde5;
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:0 20px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.checkbox-row{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:10px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
}

.checkbox-row input{
    margin-top: 8px;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=submit]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:none;
    border-radius:8px;
    background:#01cb68;
    color:#fff;
    font-weight:700; 
        text-transform:uppercase;
    font-size:18px;
    cursor:pointer;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=submit]:hover{
    opacity:.9;
}

.download-note{
    margin-top:25px;
    color:#97a0aa;
}

/* Mobile */

@media(max-width:768px){

    .himex-content h3 {
        font-size: 28px;
    }

    .himex-content p {
        font-size: 15px;
    }

    .himex-list li {
        font-size: 15px;
    }

    .himex-form-card {
        padding: 30px;
        margin-top: 30px;
    }
}


/* =========================
   HIMALAYAN JOURNAL SECTION
=========================== */

.himex-journal-section{
    padding:120px 40px;
    background:#f8f6f2;
}

.himex-journal-header{
    text-align:center;
    max-width:800px;
    margin:0 auto 70px;
}

.himex-journal-pill{
    display:inline-block;
    padding:10px 24px;
    border-radius:50px;
    background:#edf2eb;
    color:#0b3d2e;
    font-size:18px;
    font-weight:400;
        line-height:27px;
    letter-spacing:1px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
}

.himex-journal-header h3{
    margin:25px 0;
    font-size:36px;
    font-weight:700;
    line-height:47px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:#0f2f61;
}

.himex-journal-header p{
    font-size:18px;
        font-weight:400;
    color:#666;
    line-height:27px;
}

.himex-journal-grid{
    max-width:1140px;
    margin:auto;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.7fr 1fr;
    gap:30px;
}

.himex-side{
    display:grid;
    gap:30px;
}

.himex-card{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    border-radius:18px;
    min-height:320px;
}

.featured{
    min-height:700px;
}

.himex-card img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    transition:transform .8s ease;
}

.himex-card:hover img{
    transform:scale(1.08);
}

.himex-overlay{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(
        to top,
        rgba(6,20,40,.92),
        rgba(6,20,40,.15)
    );
}

.himex-journal-content{
    position:absolute;
    bottom:40px;
    left:40px;
    right:40px;
    z-index:2;
}

.himex-category{
    display:inline-block;
    padding:8px 18px;
    background:#1d8f57;
    color:#fff;
    border-radius:30px;
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:1px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.himex-journal-content h3{
    color:#fff;
    font-size:24px;
    line-height:1.2;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
    font-size:24px;
}

.himex-journal-content p{
        color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);
    margin-bottom:25px;
    line-height:24px; 
        font-size:15px; 
        font-weight:400;
}

.himex-journal-content a{
    color:#4ade80;
    font-weight:700;
    text-decoration:none;
}

.himex-journal-footer{
    text-align:center;
    margin-top:60px;
}

.himex-journal-btn{
    display:inline-block;
    background:#01cb68;
    color:#fff;
    padding:18px 40px;
    border-radius:8px;
    text-decoration:none;
    text-transform:uppercase;
        font-weight:700;
    transition:.3s;
}

.himex-journal-btn:hover{
    transform:translateY(-4px);
}

/* ===========================
   LARGE DESKTOPS
=========================== */

@media (min-width:1800px){

    .himex-journal-grid{
        max-width:1700px;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:850px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:42px;
    }
}

/* =========================
   LAPTOPS & SMALL DESKTOPS
=========================== */

@media (max-width:1200px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:100px 30px;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:600px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:30px;
        right:30px;
        bottom:30px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:32px;
    }
}

/* ========================
   TABLETS
=========================== */

@media (max-width:991px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:90px 25px;
    }

    .himex-journal-grid{
        grid-template-columns:1fr;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:550px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header{
        margin-bottom:50px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:34px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:30px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:24px;
    }
}

/* =========================
   MOBILE DEVICES
=========================== */

@media (max-width:767px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:70px 20px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header{
        margin-bottom:40px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:28px;
        line-height:1.2;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:16px;
        line-height:1.7;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:420px;
    }

    .himex-card{
        min-height:300px;
        border-radius:14px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:22px;
        right:22px;
        bottom:22px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:24px;
        margin-bottom:15px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:22px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content p{
        font-size:14px;
        line-height:1.6;
        margin-bottom:18px;
    }

    .himex-category{
        font-size:11px;
        padding:7px 14px;
        margin-bottom:14px;
    }

    .himex-journal-btn{
        width:100%;
        max-width:320px;
        text-align:center;
        padding:16px 25px;
    }
}

/* =======================
   SMALL MOBILE
========================== */

@media (max-width:480px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:60px 15px;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:360px;
    }

    .himex-card{
        min-height:260px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:18px;
        right:18px;
        bottom:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:20px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content p{
        display:none;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:24px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:15px;
    }
}

Besides, Kali Gandaki Valley and <strong>Ghorepani Poon Hill</strong> provide a fantastic opportunity to combine different local insights. These are the main attractions of the Annapurna circuit trek, which starts from Bensi Shahar. The trail goes, however, towards Thorong-La Pass, which borders Manang and Mustang. You may use these GPS coordinates to navigate the <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/d/viewer?mid=1mKuU2T3RjqgX_ALLD2wo0zaGl7Q" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Annapurna Circuit Trek Map</a>, where you can find all your walking distance details.</p> <p style="text-align: justify;" nitro-exclude="">In the meantime, <strong>Trek to Annapurna Circuit</strong> allows you to find charming villages and lush green vegetation along the Marsyandi Valley. The elevation of this trek ranges from 800 to 5416 meters, so there is a high possibility of diversifying. The <strong>Thorong La Pass</strong> is one of the tallest passes since it is 5416 meters high. It provides a 360 ° view of beautiful mountains such as Dhaulagiri, Annapurna, and Nilgiri.</p> <p style="text-align: justify;" nitro-exclude="">A<strong> Trek to Annapurna Circuit</strong> is more disturbing than the previous one due to the new construction road. Now, some segments of the alternative path are being built to prevent emissions. On this road, however, there are limited lodging and food facilities. The trail stretches even further to visit the <a href="https://www.himalayanexploration.com/tours/annapurna-sanctuary-trek/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Annapurna base camp</a>, whatever your chosen routes. But <strong>Around Annapurna Trek</strong> offers an unforgettable experience. The path takes you over 3500 meters, so proper acclimatization is necessary.</p> <p style="text-align: justify;" nitro-exclude="">Annapurna Circuit Trek is worth trying out, especially if seeking the ultimate challenge combined with unforgettable memories!</p> <h2 style="text-align: justify;" nitro-exclude="">Annapurna Circuit Trek: Highlights</h2> <div class="row nitro-offscreen"><div class="col-md-6">Trekking within the Annapurna Conservation Area is an opportunity to explore the vast diversities of flora and fauna.</div><div class="col-md-6">A witness of the panoramic views of the mountains from Poon Hill.</div></div><div class="row nitro-offscreen"><div class="col-md-6">The Marsyangdi River Valley and its natural wonders.</div><div class="col-md-6">Experience the high-altitude trekking in the comforts of tea houses.</div></div><div class="row nitro-offscreen"><div class="col-md-6">Crossing the highest pass of the Thorong La Pass at 5,416 meters with breathtaking mountain scenery.</div><div class="col-md-6"> Travel to the world’s deepest gorge in the Kali Gandaki Valley and the natural hot spring.</div></div> <div style="margin-top: 40px;" nitro-exclude="" class="nitro-offscreen"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-6"><strong>Annapurna Circuit Trek: At A Glance</strong> <table class="table table-bordered tours-tabs__table"> <tbody> <tr> <td><strong>Trek Duration</strong></td> <td>21 Days</td> </tr> <tr> <td><strong>Max. itemprop="description" content="Trek to the Annapurna Circuit is undoubtedly the world's most well-known trek. Annapurna Circuit Trek involves beautiful landscapes, Thorong-La Pass, and Mukti Nath's holiest pilgrimage site. Besides, Kali Gandaki Valley and Ghorepani Poon Hill provide a fantastic opportunity to combine different local insights. These are the main attractions of the Annapurna circuit trek, which starts from Bensi Shahar. The trail goes, however, towards Thorong-La Pass, which borders Manang and Mustang. You may use these GPS coordinates to navigate the Annapurna Circuit Trek Map, where you can find all your walking distance details. In the meantime, Trek to Annapurna Circuit allows you to find charming villages and lush green vegetation along the Marsyandi Valley. The elevation of this trek ranges from 800 to 5416 meters, so there is a high possibility of diversifying. The Thorong La Pass is one of the tallest passes since it is 5416 meters high. It provides a 360 ° view of beautiful mountains such as Dhaulagiri, Annapurna, and Nilgiri. A Trek to Annapurna Circuit is more disturbing than the previous one due to the new construction road. Now, some segments of the alternative path are being built to prevent emissions. On this road, however, there are limited lodging and food facilities. The trail stretches even further to visit the Annapurna base camp, whatever your chosen routes. But Around Annapurna Trek offers an unforgettable experience. The path takes you over 3500 meters, so proper acclimatization is necessary. Annapurna Circuit Trek is worth trying out, especially if seeking the ultimate challenge combined with unforgettable memories!
